overall_justification: The newspaper edition mentions the "Caixa de Conversão" and related topics (e.g., the regulations being drafted by the Minister of Finance, potential appointees to its administrative board) in a factual and descriptive manner. There is no explicit endorsement of either the Orthodox or Expansionist perspective. The mentions are primarily news reports about ongoing developments, lacking strong argumentation or editorial framing in favor of a particular stance.
